steps.title: Use the contradiction clue
steps.content: If the painting was made by a student under de Hooch's tutelage, then de Hooch was not simply a solitary artist. The discovery would challenge that earlier understanding.

steps.title: Choose the opposing meaning
steps.content: Choice B means being an early sign of something, not challenging it. Choice C and Choice D would strengthen the solitary-artist view. The sentence needs a word meaning to contradict or overturn an understanding. The answer is A.
